message:
fix(writing): resolve R3F API compatibility issues in visualizations

Address breaking API changes and TypeScript errors across all
visualization components to restore build compatibility.

overprompting-visualizations.tsx:
- Replace deprecated disableNormalPass with enableNormalPass={false}
  for @react-three/postprocessing EffectComposer
- Add EffectComposer with Bloom, Noise, and Vignette effects for
  enhanced visual depth in constraint visualization
- Rename Line component to ConnectionLine to avoid conflict with
  SVG <line> element in JSX namespace
- Use THREE.Line primitive pattern for proper R3F integration
- Add CameraControls for interactive 3D exploration
- Add MousePointer2 icon and mobile interaction hints
- Improve HUD overlay responsiveness with mobile-first sizing

cmaes-visualizations.tsx:
- Fix bufferAttribute API: use args={[positions, 3]} pattern instead
  of deprecated count/itemSize props
- Add explicit TypeScript types for 2D array operations
- Import Line from @react-three/drei for trajectory rendering
- Add BENCHMARKS constant with Rastrigin, Rosenbrock, Sphere,
  and Ackley test functions
- Remove duplicate NoiseRobustnessViz function definition
- Fix syntax error: remove extra bracket in coordinate calculation

barra-visualizations.tsx:
- Fix bufferAttribute API in two locations for factor exposure
  point cloud rendering

hoeffding-visualizations.tsx:
- Add custom pearsonCorrelation function (d3.corr does not exist)
- Import ShieldCheck from lucide-react for security indicators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
